---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

## Education

**Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management**\
University of British Columbia, Vancouver, BC, Canada\
Expected April 2026

**Micro-credential in Geospatial Data Collection, Analysis, and Interpretation**\
Seneca Polytechnic, Toronto, ON, Canada\
April 2024

**Bachelor of Forestry and Wildlife Management (Forestry Major)**\
Federal University of Agriculture, Abeokuta, Ogun, Nigeria\
February 2020

## Publications

### Peer-Reviewed Publications

Ezekiel, O., Yisau, J. A., & Aduradola, A. M. (2024). Effect of watering regime and mycorrhizal inoculation on the growth of Baobab (*Adansonia digitata*). *Journal of Agriculture and Environment for International Development, 118*(1), 5–18. <https://doi.org/10.36253/jaeid-12082>

### Reports

Additional technical reports and project deliverables can be added here.

## Conferences and Talks

### Invited Talks

Add invited talks here as applicable.

### Conference Presentations

Add conference presentations here as applicable.

## Awards and Honors

-   Fully funded master’s program at UBC, Mastercard Foundation Scholarship, 2025
-   Fully funded micro-credential in GIS, Seneca Polytechnic, Quick Train Canada, 2024
-   Award of Meritorious Service as Associate Agronomist, GBFOODS Africa, 2023
-   Reviewer of the Year, *Current Agriculture Research Journal*, India, 2022
-   Data Science Microdegree Scholarship, USTACKY, 2021
-   Best Graduating Student in the Department of Forestry and Wildlife Management, FUNAAB, 2020

##
